item.title: Heading
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:65:"Display heading. Use line breaks to control where the line wraps.";s:8:"required";i:1;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:2:"br";s:13:"default_value";s:64:"Mothers give us life. Now it’s time to do all we can for mama.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Subhead
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:72:"Join the For Mama Challenge to save lives and deliver hope this Ramadan.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Body
item.content:encoded:
a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:7:"wysiwyg";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"tabs";s:6:"visual";s:7:"toolbar";s:5:"basic";s:12:"media_upload";i:0;s:13:"default_value";s:359:"

800 women die everyday due to complications in pregnancy or childbirth. Without their moms, babies only have a 37% chance of making it to their first birthday.

Donate now and together we can create a world where every pregnancy is safe. Every $3 you give will be boosted an additional $1 to amplify the impact of your generosity.

";s:5:"delay";i:0;}

item.title: Hero image
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:72:"Optional. Shown in the right column. Brown placeholder shows when empty.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Video URL
item.content:encoded: a:8:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:3:"url";s:12:"instructions";s:61:"Optional. If set, the play button becomes a link to this URL.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Eyebrow
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:56:"Optional small pre-heading shown above the main heading.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:0:"";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Heading
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:116:"Display heading. The 'Script word' below will be rendered in a cursive accent font wherever it appears in this text.";s:8:"required";i:1;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:2:"br";s:13:"default_value";s:37:"A world where every pregnancy is safe";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Script word
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:105:"Single word inside the heading to render in the cursive script style. Case-insensitive, whole-word match.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:4:"safe";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Intro
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:7:"wpautop";s:13:"default_value";s:78:"Every Pregnancy envisions a world where mothers everywhere thrive. We work to:";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Mission list
item.content:encoded:
a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:7:"wysiwyg";s:12:"instructions";s:59:"Use an unordered list. Each list item is one mission point.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"tabs";s:6:"visual";s:7:"toolbar";s:5:"basic";s:12:"media_upload";i:0;s:13:"default_value";s:327:"
  • Expand the chorus of voices championing high quality maternal and newborn health care
  • Mobilize and channel resources to increase access to lifesaving care for those who need it most
  • Scale high-quality interventions to put an end to preventable maternal death in the most impacted countries
";s:5:"delay";i:0;}

item.title: Heading
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:80:"Optional section heading. Leave blank to mirror the design (no section heading).";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:0:"";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 1 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:56:"Every 2 minutes a woman dies in pregnancy or childbirth.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 1 — Icon
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:59:"Optional. If empty, a built-in placeholder SVG is rendered.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:9:"thumbnail";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 2 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:80:"Maternal and infant mortality rates are 2x as high in Muslim-majority countries.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 2 — Icon
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:59:"Optional. If empty, a built-in placeholder SVG is rendered.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:9:"thumbnail";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 3 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:81:"Well-trained midwives could help prevent 2/3s of all maternal and newborn deaths.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 3 — Icon
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:59:"Optional. If empty, a built-in placeholder SVG is rendered.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:9:"thumbnail";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 4 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:105:"More than 40% of newborn deaths could be prevented by proven interventions like skilled birth attendance.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 4 — Icon
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:59:"Optional. If empty, a built-in placeholder SVG is rendered.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:9:"thumbnail";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 1 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:70:"across the U.S. and U.K. joined Every Pregnancy during our first year.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 2 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:111:"for mothers and babies globally during Every Pregnancy's first charitable giving campaign over Ramadan in 2024.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 3 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:130:"with life-saving interventions benefiting hundreds of women and babies on the frontline of the maternal and newborn health crisis.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Stat 4 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:133:"have joined Every Pregnancy's network of champions from diverse fields including health, lifestyle, religious institutions, and more.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Heading
item.content:encoded:
a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:69:"Display heading shown above the signup form. Line breaks become
.";s:8:"required";i:1;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:2:"br";s:13:"default_value";s:48:"Let's take action for Mama. If not us, who else?";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: First Name — Label
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:52:"Label and placeholder text for the first name input.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:10:"First Name";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Email — Label
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:47:"Label and placeholder text for the email input.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:10:"Your Email";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Form Action URL
item.content:encoded: a:8:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:3:"url";s:12:"instructions";s:79:"Optional. Where the form posts on submit. Leave blank to post to the same page.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Success Message
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:95:"Message shown after a successful signup. Hidden by default; surfaced by the submission handler.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:42:"Thanks for joining the For Mama Challenge.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Quick Links — List
item.content:encoded:
a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:7:"wysiwyg";s:12:"instructions";s:109:"Edit the bulleted list of footer links. Use the list (UL) toolbar button — each
  • becomes a footer link.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"tabs";s:6:"visual";s:7:"toolbar";s:5:"basic";s:12:"media_upload";i:0;s:13:"default_value";s:271:"
    • Privacy Policy
    • Unsolicited Messages Policy
    • Terms
    • Photo Credits
    • Careers
    ";s:5:"delay";i:0;}

item.title: Copyright Text
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:66:"Use {year} and the template will replace it with the current year.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:47:"©{year} EveryPregnancy • All Rights Reserved";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Heading
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:116:"Display heading. The 'Script word' below will be rendered in a cursive accent font wherever it appears in this text.";s:8:"required";i:1;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:18:"A movement is born";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Script word
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:105:"Single word inside the heading to render in the cursive script style. Case-insensitive, whole-word match.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:4:"born";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Body
item.content:encoded:
a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:7:"wysiwyg";s:12:"instructions";s:50:"Origin-story copy. Renders as multiple paragraphs.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"tabs";s:6:"visual";s:7:"toolbar";s:5:"basic";s:12:"media_upload";i:0;s:13:"default_value";s:949:"

In 2025, a coalition of faith-inspired philanthropists and donors in the U.S. and U.K. came together with one aim: to raise awareness of the high rates of maternal death around the world. Mid-Atlantic Faith-Inspired Philanthropies, Mothers in Action and Lifelong Lifesavers joined forces to amplify a coordinated outreach campaign asking the world to think about what we owe — and should owe — to "mama" to ensure that life-saving interventions reach the mothers and babies who need them.

Over the course of Ramadan in 2025, For Mama Action Group raised $13M for maternal health programs and drove thousands of people from more than 175 countries to speak out in solidarity to lend their support and ensure preventable maternal death.

Building on this success, For Mama has now evolved into Every Pregnancy, a partnership-driven organization poised to continue transforming the state of maternal health care for years to come.

";s:5:"delay";i:0;}

item.title: Main image (right side, large)
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:107:"Optional. The larger photo that fills the right column of the collage. Conker placeholder shows when empty.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

Top-left photo in the left column of the collage.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Secondary image 2 (bottom-left of collage)
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:62:"Optional. Bottom-left photo in the left column of the collage.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Eyebrow
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:55:"Optional small label above an optional section heading.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:0:"";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Heading
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:89:"Optional section heading. The Figma design shows no heading — leave blank to mirror it.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:0:"";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Quote
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:66:"Pull quote text. Surrounding quotation marks are part of the copy.";s:8:"required";i:1;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:6;s:9:"new_lines";s:7:"wpautop";s:13:"default_value";s:369:""As a mom to twins who just turned one, I've only recently begun to hear the very sweet sounds of someone calling me 'mama'. It's something I don't take for granted — knowing that every two minutes a woman dies during pregnancy or childbirth. What gives me hope is also knowing that stat is preventable, and that a campaign like 'For Mama' is one of the first steps."";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Portrait
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:95:"Optional. If empty, a powder-pink rounded placeholder with a person silhouette renders instead.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Show slider arrows
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:10:"true_false";s:12:"instructions";s:89:"Render decorative left/right arrow buttons below the quote. Functional carousel deferred.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:2:"ui";i:1;s:13:"default_value";i:1;s:7:"message";s:0:"";s:10:"ui_on_text";s:0:"";s:11:"ui_off_text";s:0:"";}

item.title: Logo
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:67:"Optional. Falls back to the bundled EveryPregnancy logo when empty.";s:8:"required";i:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

  • becomes a nav item.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"tabs";s:6:"visual";s:7:"toolbar";s:5:"basic";s:12:"media_upload";i:0;s:13:"default_value";s:132:"
    • Partners
    • Champions
    • Pledges
    ";s:5:"delay";i:0;}

item.title: Photo
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:128:"Photograph shown on the left half of the section (Figma: 686×554, vertical). When empty, a colored placeholder fills the space.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: Variant
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:6:"select";s:12:"instructions";s:119:"Visual variant. 'Team' is the standard 3-column grid; 'Advisory' uses a tighter centered layout for the Advisory Board.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:7:"choices";a:2:{s:4:"team";s:4:"Team";s:8:"advisory";s:14:"Advisory Board";}s:13:"default_value";s:4:"team";s:13:"return_format";s:5:"value";s:2:"ui";i:0;s:8:"multiple";i:0;s:10:"allow_null";i:0;s:4:"ajax";i:0;s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:14:"create_options";i:0;s:12:"save_options";i:0;}

item.title: Heading
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:4:"text";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:66:"Empowering Mothers Worldwide: Every Pregnancy's Mission and Impact";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";s:7:"prepend";s:0:"";s:6:"append";s:0:"";}

item.title: Intro
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:4;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:313:"When you become part of the Every Pregnancy Coalition, you gain access to a powerful platform designed to elevate your impact and catalyze change. Rooted in shared values and inspired by faith, our coalition unites Muslim-led and faith-inspired organizations with a shared commitment to make every pregnancy safe.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Benefit 1 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:102:"Unlock co-funding to scale your maternal and newborn health programs to reach more mothers and babies.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Benefit 2 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:109:"Collaborate with our resource partners to bring cutting-edge health solutions to the frontlines of your work.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Benefit 3 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:160:"Increase visibility of your impact by joining a coalition that combines metrics and demonstrates the power of collective action for mothers and babies at scale.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Benefit 4 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:142:"Work side by side with other partners in-country to share learning, align strategies, and bolster the collective impact on mothers and babies.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Benefit 5 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:4;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:232:"Access tailored campaign, communication, and content support to showcase your work. Leverage a powerful network of champions and influencers to expand your reach and ensure underrepresented voices shape conversations at every level.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Benefit 6 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:130:"Receive guidance on aligning maternal and newborn health interventions with global best practices and evidence-informed solutions.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Hello world!
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Hi, this is a comment. To get started with moderating, editing, and deleting comments, please visit the Comments screen in the dashboard. Commenter avatars come from Gravatar.

item.title: Sample Page
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: http://localhost:8881.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

item.title: Home
Step 1 — Body
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:0:"";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:3;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:87:"Tell us about your organization, maternal and newborn health programs, and focal areas.";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Step 2 — Body

If set, the thumbnail becomes a link to this URL.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"default_value";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Thumbnail Image
item.content:encoded: a:16:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:5:"image";s:12:"instructions";s:75:"Optional. Shown behind the dim overlay. Brown placeholder shows when empty.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:13:"return_format";s:5:"array";s:12:"preview_size";s:6:"medium";s:7:"library";s:3:"all";s:9:"min_width";i:0;s:10:"min_height";i:0;s:8:"min_size";i:0;s:9:"max_width";i:0;s:10:"max_height";i:0;s:8:"max_size";i:0;s:10:"mime_types";s:0:"";}

item.title: About Us
item.content:encoded:
Our Mission

Every Pregnancy is a bold, partner-driven initiative dedicated to saving the lives of mothers and babies globally. Despite advancements in maternal health care, nearly 800 women die every day from preventable pregnancy complications. These lives are not just statistics — they are mothers, daughters, sisters, and friends who could have been saved with timely interventions.

No woman should have to die giving life. Yet, the reality is that where a woman lives, how much she earns, or what value her community places on her life, too often determine whether she lives or dies in childbirth. This is a profound failure of justice.

At Every Pregnancy we are changing this. We connect voices from the most affected communities with changemakers worldwide, fostering collaboration and scaling holistic maternal health interventions that are culturally sensitive and scientifically proven. Our coalition spans 40+ faith-inspired organizations that first came together in 2023 and are united in our commitment to making every pregnancy safe.

Our History

Every Pregnancy channels the power of previously untapped faith-based communities to strengthen access to high-quality maternal and newborn health care. It began with a bold vision: to unite Muslim philanthropies, advocates, and communities in a shared commitment to mothers and babies’ health.

While mothers are central to the Islamic faith and cultural identity, their health and well-being had never been mobilized as a collective cause by the community. Recognizing this gap, Dr. Alaa Murabit conceptualized a pioneering Muslim philanthropic collaborative fund to advance women’s and children’s health, creating For Mama. This initiative has since evolved into Every Pregnancy, led by Isra Chaker, who continues to expand its reach and impact in maternal and child health.

Read More

By forging new partnerships, shifting norms, and ensuring maternal health is prioritized in faith-based giving, Every Pregnancy is not just supporting mothers — it is reshaping the global maternal health landscape.

item.title: Partners
item.content:encoded:
Interested in becoming a partner?

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

Get Involved

item.title: Take Action
item.content:encoded:
Who Can Join?

We welcome nonprofit organizations of all sizes and geographies who:

  • Are legally registered as a 501(c)(3) organization (or the equivalent in your country of operation) and are in good financial standing.
  • Operate a maternal and newborn health program that has been active for at least 12 months.
  • Are committed to reporting back on program impact.
  • Are proactive and engaged members who want to fully take advantage of being part of this unique ecosystem that brings together faith, data, and justice.

item.title: Category Pills
item.content:encoded: a:11:{s:10:"aria-label";s:0:"";s:4:"type";s:8:"textarea";s:12:"instructions";s:95:"One category label per line. Leave blank to use the default 7 categories from the Figma design.";s:8:"required";b:0;s:17:"conditional_logic";b:0;s:7:"wrapper";a:3:{s:5:"width";s:0:"";s:5:"class";s:0:"";s:2:"id";s:0:"";}s:4:"rows";i:7;s:9:"new_lines";s:0:"";s:13:"default_value";s:70:"Crowdfunding tips For Mama Tips Zakat Charity Ramadan How To Give Kids";s:9:"maxlength";s:0:"";s:11:"placeholder";s:0:"";}

item.title: Pakistan Pledge
Blogs
item.content:encoded:
<!-- wp:everypregnancy/blog-featured {"data":{"tag":"Crowdfunding tips","_tag":"field_blog_featured_tag","heading":"Empowering Mothers Worldwide: Every Pregnancy's Mission and Impact","_heading":"field_blog_featured_heading","author":"Every Pregnancy","_author":"field_blog_featured_author","date":"August 20, 2022","_date":"field_blog_featured_date","cta_label":"Read Now","_cta_label":"field_blog_featured_cta_label","cta_url":"#","_cta_url":"field_blog_featured_cta_url"}} /-->

Zakat
Charity
Ramadan
How To Give
Kids","_categories":"field_blog_grid_categories"}} /-->

If not us, who else?","_heading":"field_newsletter_signup_heading","first_name_label":"First Name","_first_name_label":"field_newsletter_signup_first_name_label","email_label":"Your Email","_email_label":"field_newsletter_signup_email_label","submit_label":"Sign Up","_submit_label":"field_newsletter_signup_submit_label"}} /-->
